raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "what_exists": "Formal AURA grievance intake + admin review endpoint", "what_it_does": "Allows users to file grievances about AURA scores or assessment outcomes, with admin review and resolution", "quality_assessment": "Meets requirements, but potential security concerns with user input sanitization"}], "summary": "Grievance endpoint meets ISO 10667-2 §7 requirements, but may have security issues with user input", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "apps/api/app/middleware/rate_limit.py"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
